name: inkdown
description: A Windows-installable Markdown editor inspired by Typora.
author: OpenAI Codex

scripts.dev:electron:debug: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=true ELECTRON_ENABLE_STACK_DUMPING=true DEBUG=* NODE_OPTIONS=--trace-warnings electron .
scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-isolation=none tests/frontmatter-utils.test.mjs tests/source-editing-utils.test.mjs tests/editor-structured-editing.test.mjs tests/editing-surface.test.mjs tests/preview-sanitizer.test.mjs tests/preview-rendering.test.mjs tests/preview-links.test.mjs tests/preview-search.test.mjs tests/external-links.test.mjs tests/io-errors.test.mjs tests/workspace-tree.test.mjs tests/renderer-trust.test.mjs tests/csp-policy.test.mjs tests/toolbar.test.mjs tests/ui-density.test.mjs tests/dialog-consistency.test.mjs tests/pane-feedback.test.mjs tests/find-bar.test.mjs tests/find-context.test.mjs tests/pane-actions.test.mjs tests/source-context-actions.test.mjs tests/editor-context-actions.test.mjs tests/editor-guidance.test.mjs
